mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flg = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flg = 0

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flg = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, content, name, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tasks SET delete_flg = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
